title: Senior Plant Manager at Birla Tyres

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Birla Tyres
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Plant Manager looking for your next big career move? Birla Tyres in Kolkata offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Birla Tyres:
Birla Tyres is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Birla Tyres!
